title: Write Data Values into a JSON File Using Multiple Threads

criteria.description: Defines a function that accepts a list of (file_path, data) tuples
Uses Python's threading module to spawn one thread per file
Each thread independently serializes data to JSON and writes to its file
Returns a dictionary mapping each file path to True (success) or False (failure)
Uses a thread-safe mechanism when writing to the results dictionary
Handles write errors per thread without crashing the other threads
